scope.goal: Record bounded architecture decisions for all critical remediation slices.
scope.target: ES lifecycle, reasoned Order transitions, CQRS repositories, durable messaging and broker profiles
constraints: Keep Application free of Wolverine types
Do not claim atomicity without failure-injection evidence

user_constraints: Every actual Order state change requires a reason
Use Wolverine PostgreSQL first behind an interface
Use memory queues for default automated tests

acceptance: Committed pending events clear exactly once
Every actual transition records a reason
Persistence mechanism and transaction owner are explicit
Write and read ports are separated
Kafka and RabbitMQ both expose complete business routes
Stable idempotency identity and failure policy are explicit

steps: Move scheduled backlog detail into workflow tasks
deferred_items: MSG-003 Product producer until a future commercial requirement approves event meaning and consumer need

results.summary: Accepted reasoned Order transitions and a pluggable durable messaging boundary; Wolverine PostgreSQL is the first adapter but must prove atomic enlistment with Dapper/Npgsql.
validation_evidence: Codebase graph and source boundaries reviewed
